'''Arca Jeth's Praxeum''', also known as '''Master Arca's Training Center''', was an [[Jedi academy|academy]] on [[Arkania/Legends|Arkania]] used by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. Serving as the facility's administrator, [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] [[Arca Jeth]] made this place his home throughout the [[Old Sith Wars]].

==History==
[[File:ArcaJethsPraxeum-TEGtPaM.png|thumb|left|The Arkanian praxeum.]]
Established by Master Jeth deep within the Arkanian wilderness, the facility was far from the [[Diamond/Legends|diamond]] [[Mining/Legends|mines]] that riddled the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. The praxeum was equipped to train and house many students at a time, sometime upwards of twenty. Using ancient [[Jedi training droid/Legends|training droids]] and wild [[Arkanian dragon/Legends|Arkanian dragons]] as opponents, Jeth educated his students in the ways of [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|Lightsaber combat]], [[The Force/Legends|Force]] [[Force power/Legends|techniques]], [[Meditation/Legends|meditation]], and diplomacy.<ref name="TOTJC" />

Many [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Knights]] passed through the praxeum's halls, including [[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]], [[Cay Qel-Droma]], and [[Tott Doneeta]].<ref name="TOTJC" /> During the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]], the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] acknowledged [[Padawan/Legends|Padawans]] [[Krynda Draay|Krynda Hulis]] and [[Barrison Draay]]'s passage of the [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Jedi Trials]] and [[Knighting Ceremony/Legends|conferred]] upon them the rank of Knight. Along with the Knights stationed at the praxeum, Jeth formally knighted the pair, leaving out Padawan [[Haazen]], as he had failed the Trials.<ref name="KOTOR33" />

==Layout==
A two story structure made of lumber and stone, the praxeum building contained a main hall, which served to host knighting ceremonies, training bouts, and other events. A small porch encircled the main building. A courtyard was located not far from the main buildings, surrounded by stone walls with carvings and art sketched into it.<ref name="KOTOR33" />
